channel.title: Claude Blog
channel.description: Product news and best practices for teams building with Claude.

item.title: Multi-agent coordination patterns: Five approaches and when to use them
item.description: Five multi-agent coordination patterns, their trade-offs, and when to evolve from one to another.

item.title: Seeing like an agent: how we design tools in Claude Code
item.description: Building Claude Code: How Anthropic designs and refines AI agent tools like AskUserQuestion and Task tool. The key is progressive disclosure and learning to "see like an agent" to maximize effectiveness.

item.title: Making Claude Cowork ready for enterprise
item.description: Claude Cowork is now generally available on all paid plans. Within companies, Claude Cowork has become a key part of how teams operate: handling tasks, drafting project deliverables, and keeping teams up to date.

item.title: The advisor strategy: Give agents an intelligence boost
item.description: Pair Opus as an advisor with Sonnet or Haiku as an executor, and get Opus-level intelligence in your agents at a fraction of the cost.

item.title: How Carta Healthcare gets AI to reason like a clinical abstractor
item.description: How Carta Healthcare used Claude and context engineering to build Lighthouse, a clinical abstraction platform reaching 99% accuracy across 22,000 cases a year.

item.title: Claude Managed Agents: get to production 10x faster
item.description: Introducing Claude Managed Agents, a suite of composable APIs for building and deploying cloud-hosted agents at scale.

item.title: How and when to use subagents in Claude Code
item.description: When to delegate research, parallelize tasks, or get a fresh review with Claude Code subagents—and when to stick with the main session.

item.title: Harnessing Claude’s intelligence
item.description: Three patterns for building on the Claude Platform that keep pace with Claude's evolving intelligence while balancing latency and cost.

item.title: Audit Claude Platform activity with the Compliance API
item.description: The Compliance API gives admins programmatic access to audit logs across their Claude Platform organization.

item.title: Auto mode for Claude Code
item.description: Auto mode lets Claude Code make permission decisions with built-in safeguards — fewer interruptions than default, less risk than skipping permissions.

item.title: Put Claude to work on your computer
item.description: Claude now opens your apps, navigates your browser, and runs your dev tools to complete tasks. Assign from your phone with Dispatch. Research preview on macOS.

item.title: Product management on the AI exponential
item.description: Claude Code’s Head of Product Cat Wu shares how teams should rethink their workflows and roadmaps in the face of rapidly evolving model intelligence.

item.title: Code with Claude comes to San Francisco, London, and Tokyo
item.description: Technical sessions, live demos of new capabilities, and office hours with Anthropic engineers—watch live or apply to attend.

item.title: 1M context is now generally available for Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6
item.description: Standard pricing now applies across the full 1M window for both models, with no long-context premium. Media limits expand to 600 images or PDF pages.

item.title: Claude now creates interactive charts, diagrams and visualizations
item.description: Ask Claude to explain a concept or analyze your data, and it can respond with interactive charts, diagrams, and visualizations — rendered inline as part of the conversation.
